'''zarunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zeda|zeda]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-r-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zeda|zeda]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zarunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zærinith|zærinith]] || [[word:zærinij|zærinij]] || [[word:zærinish|zærinish]] || [[word:zærini|zærini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zarurunuth|zarurunuth]] || [[word:zarurunuj|zarurunuj]] || [[word:zarurunush|zarurunush]] || [[word:zarurunu|zarurunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zarunuth|zarunuth]] || [[word:zarunuj|zarunuj]] || [[word:zarunush|zarunush]] || [[word:zarunu|zarunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zarufnuth|zarufnuth]] || [[word:zarufnuj|zarufnuj]] || [[word:zarufnush|zarufnush]] || [[word:zarufnuf|zarufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zarunuthu|zarunuthu]] || [[word:zarunuju|zarunuju]] || [[word:zarunushu|zarunushu]] || [[word:zarunuku|zarunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zarunuth|zarunuth]] || [[word:zarunuj|zarunuj]] || [[word:zarunush|zarunush]] || [[word:zarunu|zarunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zarunuthul|zarunuthul]] || [[word:zarunujul|zarunujul]] || [[word:zarunushul|zarunushul]] || [[word:zarunukul|zarunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zarunuthuthu|zarunuthuthu]] || [[word:zarunujuju|zarunujuju]] || [[word:zarunushushu|zarunushushu]] || [[word:zarunuku|zarunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zarunuthun|zarunuthun]] || [[word:zarunujun|zarunujun]] || [[word:zarunushun|zarunushun]] || [[word:zarunukun|zarunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zarunuthuoro|zarunuthuoro]] || [[word:zarunujuoro|zarunujuoro]] || [[word:zarunushuoro|zarunushuoro]] || [[word:zarunukuoro|zarunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
